home.heroLead:
ADido is a Cheongdam beauty salon — true to the heart we began with —
pursuing beauty, style and ease through an artist's eye.
home.introBody: Take the capitals and you spell ADIDO. Faithful to the spirit we started with, we pursue beauty, style, and ease through an artist's eye. From a quiet corner of Cheongdam, we design a grain that quietly settles into your everyday.
home.ctaTitle:
Let's open your
next page together.
home.ctaBody: Reservations via Naver. Inquiries by phone or KakaoTalk.

prices.title: Treatments & Price
prices.lead: Designs that read your grain rather than chase trends. All prices reflect the designer event rate.
prices.ctaTitle:
Continue with the
treatment you want.
prices.ctaBody: Per-designer pricing is available on Naver Booking.

designers.title: Designers
designers.lead: Sixteen hands searching for the design that quietly suits your everyday.

about.title: To you, who came to ADido in trust.
about.lead: ADido finds the style that suits you best, and offers you a design that lets you shine.
about.section1Body: True to its name — a large transparency — we analyze the most composed form without clouding your natural grain. From the studio lighting, to the breath you take as you settle into the chair, to the way you appear when you step out onto the street — within the small space of the salon, we design and apply every single step.
about.section2Title: A thorough consultation, a striking change
about.section2Body: Face and head shape, hair texture and density, the way you dress, the rhythm of your days. Each designer takes ample time to read you before the work begins. Then we propose a design made 'for you, and only you.'
about.section3Title: Open your new page with us.
about.section3Body: 3F, JS Building, 421 Dosan-daero, Gangnam. At ADido — a composed interior that reads like a single painting — we open your next page together.

gallery.title: Space & Work
gallery.lead: The interior, and the day's work — in one frame.

contact.title: How to find us
contact.lead: 421 Dosan-daero, JS Building, 3F. Easy access on foot or by valet.
